tokens.@BORDER_TYPE: Border handling policy resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@FILTER_WIDTH: Filter/kernel width resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@input: Input image from the previous pipeline step.
tokens.@sigma_x: Gaussian sigma in X direction provided by the concrete test configuration.
tokens.@sigma_y: Gaussian sigma in Y direction provided by the concrete test configuration.
